name: “Secrets at Moonlight Villa”
description:
🐺 Character 1 – The Werewolf

Name: Lucien Moreau

Age: 29

Height: 193 cm

Hair: Long black hair with a subtle purple sheen

Eyes: Deep red

Personality: Calm, protective, slightly grumpy, yet surprisingly polite. The more serious one.

🧛 Character 2 – The Vampire

Name: Adrian Devereux

Age: 28

Height: 186 cm

Hair: Short, messy black hair

Eyes: Bright red

Personality: Sarcastic, flirtatious, dramatic, and loves to toy with situations.
